summary: Tested card labeling bug fix. Backend: 9/9 tests passed - POST /api/congrats/create correctly accepts card_type parameter and stores it. Cards of all 6 types (congrats, birthday, anniversary, thankyou, welcome, holiday) are created with correct headlines. Frontend: Card type detection logic verified - messages render with correct labels/icons/colors based on event_type field.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/congrats/create at line 377 accepts card_type=Form('congrats') as parameter
VERIFIED: Backend stores card_type in congrats_cards document at line 499
VERIFIED: GET /api/congrats/card/{id} returns headline based on card_type (e.g., 'Happy Birthday!' for birthday type)
VERIFIED: Frontend thread page line 1509 detects card type from event_type field using pattern '{type}_card_sent'
VERIFIED: Frontend CARD_DISPLAY config at line 1526-1533 has all 6 card types with correct icons/colors/labels
VERIFIED: Frontend sets event_type to '{cardType}_card_sent' at line 1143 when creating cards
VERIFIED: Contact events API returns proper event_type (e.g., 'birthday_card_sent') with title 'Birthday Card Sent'
VERIFIED: /settings/create-card page correctly shows card type in title (e.g., 'Birthday Card') when type URL param is passed
seed_data_creation: Created 6 test cards with different card_types: TEST_Default_Card_Customer (congrats), TEST_Birthday_Customer (birthday), TEST_Anniversary_Customer (anniversary), TEST_ThankYou_Customer (thankyou), TEST_Welcome_Customer (welcome), TEST_Holiday_Customer (holiday)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Card labeling fix is fully implemented. Backend stores card_type and returns appropriate headlines. Frontend detects card type from event_type field in messages and renders with correct label/icon/color. The fix resolves the bug where all cards were incorrectly labeled as 'Congrats Card'.

backend_api.POST /api/congrats/create: Accepts card_type parameter, defaults to 'congrats', stores in MongoDB
backend_api.GET /api/congrats/card/{id}: Returns correct headline based on card_type
backend_api.GET /api/congrats/template/{store_id}: Returns type-specific defaults for all 6 card types
backend_api.GET /api/congrats/history/{user_id}: Returns card_type field for each card
backend_api.POST /api/messages/send/{user_id}: Stores event_type from frontend payload into messages and contact_events

frontend_verified.Card type selector in thread modal: data-testid='card-type-{key}' chips exist for all 6 types at line 2468
frontend_verified.Message rendering: Detects card type from event_type field at line 1509, displays correct label/icon/color

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS won't actually send but messages are logged in DB
